_docs_repo_comment: Root of the documentation repository. 'docs/self/' holds pipeline docs; 'docs/projects/' holds per-project docs. Can be an absolute path to a separate docs repo.
_execution_mode_comment: Global default: 'api' (Anthropic SDK) or 'claude_code' (Claude Code CLI). Override per-step with 'execution_mode' on any step.

claude_code._command_comment: The CLI command to invoke. Change to full path if 'claude' is not on PATH.
claude_code._timeout_comment: Per-invocation timeout. Code-writing steps may need longer (up to 600s).
claude_code._code_tools_comment: Tools available to code-writing steps in claude_code mode.
claude_code._read_only_tools_comment: Tools available to structured-output steps in claude_code mode.

steps.name: Requirements Generation
steps.description: Analyze the feature request and produce a detailed requirements specification with acceptance criteria

steps.name: Implementation Plan
steps.description: Create a detailed implementation plan including file structure, interfaces, and dependencies

steps.name: TDD Red Phase
steps.description: Write comprehensive failing tests that cover all acceptance criteria

steps.name: TDD Green + Implementation
steps.description: Implement the code to make all tests pass, ensuring compilation and test success

steps.name: Requirements Verification
steps.description: Verify that every acceptance criterion is genuinely satisfied by the implementation

steps.name: Integration Tests
steps.description: Write and execute end-to-end integration tests that verify the system works as a whole

steps.name: Post-mortem Analysis
steps.description: Analyze the full pipeline run and propose concrete improvements to the pipeline itself

steps.name: Documentation Update
steps.description: Create or update the project's living documentation in the docs repository
steps._doc_workspace_comment: Tells the runner to use the project's docs folder as the workspace for this step, not the code workspace.
